world_system.thesis: Every inhabitant is a villain shaped by survival in a dry, tactile, occult world. Shared finish creates one world; trait grammar creates family resemblance; combat role creates board-readable function; individual body, face, species and psychology prevent uniformity.
shared_finish: Favor matte, dry, worn and porous surfaces; reserve gloss for a specific wet, vitreous or precious material with narrative cause.
Show accumulated survival through repair, depletion, contamination, asymmetry, scar, posture or altered anatomy rather than decorative grime alone.
Preserve controlled color. Desaturation is a finish, not a ban; each chromatic choice must carry trait or psychological meaning.
Read hostile intent in mass, negative space and posture before lore, facial anger or floating effects explain it.
Use one dominant visual thesis per unit. Repetition of small accessories never substitutes for a distinct body plan.
Keep all conscious characters villain-first, while varying evil through manipulation, ferality, dissociation, numb obedience, theatricality, obsession, hunger, shame and predatory calm.
prior_pass_lessons: Vellum is the material-richness and anti-gloss veto, never a shared costume template.
Creep proves that narrow, alien, dissociated horror can outperform ornate gothic decoration; do not give every monster the same demon anatomy.
Paisley proves that strange color, pattern and fabric movement belong in the world when weathered and psychologically specific.
Morwen defines the attractive-adult lane: dangerous, wounded, controlled, villainous and non-explicit; appeal must not collapse into one face or clothing aisle.
The horror pass overused rib masks, hooks, halos, black cloth and generic demon anatomy; symbolic meaning must live in anatomy, posture or behavior before ornament.
The women pass overused black leather, long coats, corsets, heels, leg slits, rear poses and orbiting clutter; every person needs an individual face, body, garment family and form of villainy.
trait_channel_hierarchy: Art-primary trait owns the dominant mass, negative space and garment/anatomy family.
Secondary trait owns a separate surface channel: palette, material, pattern or magical movement.
A third trait, when present, owns one restrained cost mark, anatomical corruption or secondary rhythm.
Combat role owns stance, reach, weight distribution and the speed implied by the silhouette.
Individual identity owns face, age, gender expression, body type, species, history and survival psychology.
A finished unit should show two strong trait signals and at most one subtle signal; more usually becomes visual soup.
roster_wide_prohibitions: No shared black-cloak, black-leather or tarnished-trinket uniform across unrelated traits.
No same-face, same-body, same-corset, same-heel, same-leg-slit or same-rear-pose convergence.
No trait may depend entirely on a halo, horn, hook, rib mask, floating object or orbiting effect.
No clean heroic fantasy, porcelain skin, latex shine, glossy gacha finish, mascot anatomy or generic Bloodborne imitation.
No automatic full-black palette. Neutrals must leave room for trait-specific color, material and pattern.
No supernatural power without a visible price borne by body, memory, identity, relationship or environment.

exit_tests: All 22 live traits have one complete card with every required Phase 1 field.
Every trait has a prop-free definition that remains recognizable without a named costume, object or production effect.
Every palette, pattern, material and motion family is distinct enough to avoid one shared gothic costume lane.
Blessed reads as disgrace, shame, ruined miracle and compulsory penance before it reads as angelic.
Sanguine supports courtly, medical, feral, monastic and nonhuman vampyr lanes rather than one vampire stereotype.
Kaleidoscope reads as weathered psychedelic perception fracture rather than glossy rainbow crystal.
Combination rules preserve separate visual channels and cap visible trait signals at two strong plus one subtle.
The compact atlas contains only abstract reference information; it is not new unit artwork or production asset creation.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Defensive bonuses with cast-based defensive stacking for members and allies.
traits.core_fantasy: Protection as incarceration: safety granted by something that encloses, claims and gradually turns the protected body into part of the ward.
traits.emotional_tone: Possessive vigilance, punitive care and the claustrophobic relief of surviving inside a prison.
traits.silhouette_language: Nested masses and sheltering overhangs create guarded negative space. The figure should appear to close around a threat or protected volume rather than pose as a noble defender.
garment_anatomy_families: Nested architectural planes that overlap without becoming conventional plate
Ringed or chambered anatomy that creates protected interior voids
Dense wrapped and quilted construction with deliberate closure lines
Scar lattices and calcified growth that record every absorbed impact
Membranous or shell-like nonhuman enclosures
traits.magic_behavior: Defense moves inward. Thin planes, scars or membranes close in sequence; impacts redirect through visible paths and leave new fractures rather than blooming as a clean blue bubble.
traits.supernatural_cost: Each act of protection reduces sensation, flexibility or personal boundary. The defender calcifies, hollows or becomes a permanent enclosure for damage that never fully leaves.
combination_rules: As primary, Aegis owns enclosing mass and protected negative space.
As secondary, Aegis appears in closure seams, stress paths or a bodily sacrifice—not extra defensive equipment.
With Bulwark, Aegis supplies enclosing protection while Bulwark supplies compression and release.
With Blessed, protection must deepen humiliation or bodily cost rather than sanctify the figure.

compact_visual_references.form: nested alcoves and closing shells
compact_visual_references.surface: salt efflorescence crossed by stained-glass stress lines
compact_visual_references.motion: successive planes folding toward an impact
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: calcified joints and sensation-dead skin

traits.prop_free_definition: A possessive defense that survives by enclosing bodies and slowly turning them into the prison itself.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Spell power, kill stacks and high-tier amplification or double-cast behavior.
traits.core_fantasy: Forbidden spellcraft as invasive language: knowledge that rewrites the caster while rewarding mastery with increasingly illegal power.
traits.emotional_tone: Controlled obsession, intellectual trespass and the cold pride of understanding something that should not be legible.
traits.silhouette_language: Long, precise tensions terminate in sharp interruptions. The body feels edited, annotated or held in an unnatural grammatical pause instead of reading as a generic robed caster.
garment_anatomy_families: Inscribed skin and tendon lines that behave like living syntax
Severe clerical, laboratory, itinerant and courtly knowledge-worker constructions
Asymmetrical folded planes resembling edited or erased passages
Black-glass or scarred anatomical inserts
Alien mathematical bodies organized around impossible ratios
traits.magic_behavior: Marks appear in a single disciplined locus, crawl under a surface, then burn away or repeat out of sequence. Double casts should feel like a forbidden sentence correcting reality twice.
traits.supernatural_cost: Language consumes language: speech, memory, names or parts of the body are overwritten. Mastery leaves burns, missing recollections and anatomy reorganized into notation.
combination_rules: As primary, Arcanist owns precision, taper and the inscribed or edited body.
As secondary, it owns one controlled notation system or cast echo while the primary trait keeps the silhouette.
With Scholar, Arcanist is transgressive application while Scholar is accumulated knowledge and bodily storage.
With Overload, syntax should break cadence and misfire rather than simply glow brighter.

compact_visual_references.form: tensioned verticals interrupted like edited sentences
compact_visual_references.surface: palimpsest ink over smoke-dark glass
compact_visual_references.motion: marks writing inward, burning away, then repeating
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: lost speech and anatomy reorganized as notation

traits.prop_free_definition: Illegal knowledge becomes living syntax that sharpens power while rewriting memory, language and flesh.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Increased healing and protection, with excess restoration becoming further protection at higher tiers.
traits.core_fantasy: Divine favor experienced as disgrace: fallen angels, failed saints, shame, ruined miracles and compulsory penance.
traits.emotional_tone: Public humiliation, exhausted beauty, self-loathing, bitter obedience and cruelty born from being forced to perform mercy.
traits.silhouette_language: The body folds inward, drags or bears an unwanted sacred weight. Even a large or beautiful form must read as disgraced, watched and compelled before it reads as celestial.
garment_anatomy_families: Penitential wrapping, scorched ceremonial cloth and old medical fiber
Molting, vestigial or inward-folded avian anatomy
Ex-voto growths, stigmatic tissue and cracked gilded skin
Failed-saint bodies marked by repeated restoration
Nonhuman organisms forced to exude protective secretions
traits.magic_behavior: A miracle should arrive reluctantly and transfer consequence. Healing exposes old wounds, draws injury into the source or builds tense scar-like protection instead of clean radiant spectacle.
traits.supernatural_cost: Every miracle deepens visible shame: wounds migrate, tissue calcifies, sacred growths fail, beauty decays or the body is forced to display the suffering it removed from others.
allowed_variations: living evidence of a ruined miracle
combination_rules: Blessed always owns shame, posture, facial condition or visible miracle cost even when secondary.
Celestial anatomy is optional; disgrace and compulsory mercy are mandatory.
With Titan or Fortified, scale and endurance must intensify the burden rather than create a heroic colossus.
With Kaleidoscope, color behaves like damaged revelation and sensory punishment, never celebratory radiance.

compact_visual_references.form: inward-folded weight and failed upward growth
compact_visual_references.surface: dirty wax, cracked gilding and bruised scar tissue
compact_visual_references.motion: reluctant light transferring wounds toward its source
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: shame posture and fresh evidence of borrowed pain

traits.prop_free_definition: Unwanted grace preserves others by humiliating, exposing and physically degrading the being forced to channel it.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Tenacity with a high-tier first-control cleanse and protective response.
traits.core_fantasy: Restraint survived and weaponized: a body that learned to resist control by internalizing the pressure once used to contain it.
traits.emotional_tone: Controlled panic, stubborn refusal and the frightening stillness of someone waiting for restraint to snap.
traits.silhouette_language: Shortened gaps, dense joints and lateral compression make the figure look difficult to move. Release should feel sudden because the resting state stores pressure.
garment_anatomy_families: Dense wrapped, quilted and braced construction
Compression-scar bands and flattened tissue
Block-jointed or low-slung nonhuman bodies
Repair webbing that records repeated containment
Bodies shaped by cages, institutional restraint or crushing environments without depicting the object itself
traits.magic_behavior: Control pressure accumulates visibly, then breaks in one sharp release. The response is bodily and mechanical—tension discharges, a locked rhythm skips—rather than a generic immunity glow.
traits.supernatural_cost: Resistance leaves joints locked, breath shallow and sensation numbed. Each release reopens old restraint injuries or makes the body less capable of softness.
combination_rules: As primary, Bulwark owns compression, density and stored release.
As secondary, use banding, joint behavior or a single snapped rhythm instead of adding bulk everywhere.
With Aegis, Bulwark is internal resistance while Aegis is external enclosure.
With Striker, released pressure becomes forward momentum but must retain visible restraint damage.

compact_visual_references.form: compressed blocks with almost no loose negative space
compact_visual_references.surface: quilted density crossed by old pressure scars
compact_visual_references.motion: long stillness followed by one snapped release
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: locked joints, flattened breath and reopened bands

traits.prop_free_definition: A compressed survivor stores the memory of restraint until attempted control triggers a violent bodily release.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Team-wide bonuses derived from the costs represented on the field.
traits.core_fantasy: Criminal loyalty enforced through valuation: belonging is purchased, status is visible and every relationship carries a price.
traits.emotional_tone: Predatory intimacy, conspiratorial calm, class resentment and the security of being owned by dangerous people.
traits.silhouette_language: Figures imply closed ranks through inward angles, paired asymmetries and guarded social distance. Luxury appears repaired, inherited or stolen rather than pristine.
garment_anatomy_families: Predatory formal, labor-gang, prison-economy and decayed aristocratic construction
Repaired luxury with visible ownership changes
Paired markings or anatomical repetitions that imply a network
Segmented nonhuman colonies governed by rank
Bodies branded, altered or weighted according to value
traits.magic_behavior: Power moves across proximity and status. Advantage transfers like pressure through a closed network; value makes bodies visually heavier or more protected without summoning literal currency.
traits.supernatural_cost: Identity becomes collateral. Members carry brands, shared pain, purchased repairs or bodily evidence that their survival belongs to the group.
combination_rules: As primary, Cartel owns social geometry, rank and repaired luxury.
As secondary, it appears through shared marks, material quality or ownership scars—not matching outfits.
With Mogul, Cartel is networked value while Mogul is personal accumulation and spatial dominance.
With Trader, Cartel is enforced belonging while Trader remains mobile, opportunistic and culturally mixed.

compact_visual_references.form: inward angles and ranked proximity
compact_visual_references.surface: repaired luxury carrying multiple ownership scars
compact_visual_references.motion: pressure and advantage passing through a closed network
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: identity branded as group collateral

traits.prop_free_definition: A closed criminal network converts rank, price and belonging into shared power while mortgaging every member's identity.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Post-battle item transformation through combining or evolution.
traits.core_fantasy: Irreversible transformation: contact between unlike substances produces a new state that cannot return to what it was.
traits.emotional_tone: Hungry curiosity, bodily trespass and exhilaration at becoming useful through permanent change.
traits.silhouette_language: Asymmetry must show before and after states in one body. One side fuses, ruptures, flowers or vitrifies while the other retains the prior condition.
garment_anatomy_families: Fused seams joining incompatible materials
Kiln-cracked ceramic or heat-warped bodies
Botanical, fungal and biochemical chimera growth
Industrial bodies shaped by reaction chambers without gadget clutter
Textiles and skin permanently changed along a visible reaction front
traits.magic_behavior: Change begins at one contact point and travels across a material boundary. The result is a visible state change—fusing, vitrifying, charring, sprouting—not a cloud of alchemical accessories.
traits.supernatural_cost: Every successful reaction leaves an irreversible mutation, fused joint, contaminated memory or incompatible material growing through the body.
combination_rules: As primary, Catalyst owns visible state transition and fused asymmetry.
As secondary, it changes one material or anatomical site chosen by the primary trait.
A third trait may alter the result of the reaction but cannot add another transformation center.
With Titan, transformation affects strata or communal mass; with Kaleidoscope, it affects perception before color saturation.

compact_visual_references.form: one body split between prior and transformed states
compact_visual_references.surface: heat bloom crossing ceramic, slag and tissue
compact_visual_references.motion: a reaction front traveling from one contact point
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: permanent fusion and incompatible growth

traits.prop_free_definition: Contact triggers irreversible material and bodily change, making usefulness inseparable from contamination and lost original form.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Allied acceleration and enemy slowing based on the number of Chronomancers.
traits.core_fantasy: Stolen years and temporal decay: time is redistributed rather than controlled, leaving age, injury and memory out of order.
traits.emotional_tone: Impatient exhaustion, nostalgia for events not yet lived and terror of arriving after one's own death.
traits.silhouette_language: Contours echo at slightly wrong intervals; one region appears older, younger or delayed. The shape suggests a body failing to occupy one moment cleanly.
garment_anatomy_families: Mismatched-age anatomy across one body
Layered eras of wear and repair
Interrupted growth, regression or fossilization
Faded duelist, laborer, court and nomadic constructions from incompatible periods
Larval, fossil and senescent nonhuman stages coexisting
traits.magic_behavior: Motion arrives early or late. Afterimages misregister, dust briefly reverses and wounds wait before appearing; the behavior should never depend on visible clockwork.
traits.supernatural_cost: Age distributes unevenly, memories lose sequence, injuries are deferred into worse moments and fatigue duplicates instead of resolving.
combination_rules: As primary, Chronomancer owns repeated contour, age mismatch and delayed posture.
As secondary, it changes the age or timing of one primary-trait channel.
With Overload, time skips and drops rather than becoming continuous speed energy.
With Exile, temporal displacement reinforces absence without defaulting to a traveler archetype.

compact_visual_references.form: one contour repeated at unequal intervals
compact_visual_references.surface: faded layers aging at different rates
compact_visual_references.motion: early afterimage, delayed impact, brief reverse dust
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: unequal age and memories out of sequence

traits.prop_free_definition: Time is redistributed across one life, accelerating allies while leaving age, injury and memory permanently out of order.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Critical lethality, kill stacking and high-tier bleed or protection-bypass behavior.
traits.core_fantasy: Procedural death and official cruelty: killing treated as a final administrative action rather than a burst of rage.
traits.emotional_tone: Cold certainty, practiced contempt and the calm of someone who believes an ending has already been authorized.
traits.silhouette_language: Weight gathers above a decisive downward line. Neck, joint and termination zones are emphasized; the pose appears mid-verdict rather than stealthy or acrobatic.
garment_anatomy_families: Top-heavy or shearing anatomy built around downward force
State, slaughterhouse, surgical and ritual-functionary constructions
Dense collar and termination-line anatomy
Insect, avian or machine-like predation organized around one final stroke
Bodies scarred by repetitive authorized killing
traits.magic_behavior: Force compresses into one downward or severing event. Effects fall, split or stop abruptly; they do not orbit, flourish or advertise stealth.
traits.supernatural_cost: The body stiffens into procedure, sensation dulls and victims leave persistent marks. Repetition makes reversal, mercy and lateral movement physically difficult.
combination_rules: As primary, Executioner owns downward mass and the single terminating line.
As secondary, it contributes a finish rhythm or one anatomical shear point—not an occupational costume.
With Vindicator, Vindicator strips resistance while Executioner ends the target.
With Exile, lethal function survives after social identity and belonging have been removed.

compact_visual_references.form: top weight collapsing into one downward line
compact_visual_references.surface: broad iron, bone and dried termination marks
compact_visual_references.motion: compression followed by an abrupt final stop
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: stiffened procedure and victim traces that remain

traits.prop_free_definition: Death becomes a calm authorized procedure expressed through descending force, severed continuity and a body losing mercy.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Exact-count ability upgrades at one, three or five fielded Exiles.
traits.core_fantasy: No-home survival and erased identity: power comes from living outside belonging, with exact gatherings briefly creating a substitute condition.
traits.emotional_tone: Watchful isolation, severed pride, cultural grief and the dangerous self-sufficiency of someone no group can reclaim.
traits.silhouette_language: One region appears separated from the rest by negative space, missing continuity or mismatched construction. The body never settles into a complete symmetrical belonging.
garment_anatomy_families: Mismatched repairs from incompatible places and eras
Missing, blank or deliberately erased identity regions
Weathered nomadic, court-banished, scavenged and institutional-survivor construction
Separated or socially absent anatomy
Nonhuman castoffs with incomplete colony, pack or hive morphology
traits.magic_behavior: Position, attachment and continuity briefly detach. At exact counts, isolated rhythms align for one sharp upgrade, then remain visibly separate rather than becoming a matching faction.
traits.supernatural_cost: Names, features, cultural memory or physical connections erode. The body cannot fully settle, heal into symmetry or be recognized by its former belonging.
combination_rules: As primary, Exile owns absence, detachment and mismatched construction.
As secondary, it removes or interrupts one channel belonging to the primary trait.
Exact-count strength should intensify relational spacing, not produce identical clothing or anatomy.
With Sanguine, exile changes the culture and psychology of hunger rather than merely weathering a vampire costume.

compact_visual_references.form: a continuous body interrupted by deliberate absence
compact_visual_references.surface: incompatible repairs with erased identity patches
compact_visual_references.motion: drifting parts that align only at exact moments
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: names, features and belonging worn away

traits.prop_free_definition: Power comes from permanent unbelonging, with identity and bodily continuity eroded each time isolation becomes useful.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Incoming damage reduction for members and, at higher tiers, allies.
traits.core_fantasy: Siege architecture made flesh: survival through load-bearing structure, layered repair and the refusal to collapse under accumulated impact.
traits.emotional_tone: Grounded fatalism, patient endurance and the grim dignity of becoming infrastructure for other people's survival.
traits.silhouette_language: Mass settles downward through buttressed, layered forms. The body reads as load-bearing and repaired, not simply large or covered in conventional protection.
garment_anatomy_families: Buttressed torsos and load-bearing limbs
Layered masonry, earth or densely woven tissue
Embedded repair systems and visible structural patches
Squat, columnar, quadruped and low-spread body plans
Soft bodies made stable through tension, packing or interlock
traits.magic_behavior: Impacts redistribute through visible structural paths, settle into lower layers and leave dust, flex or small compression fractures. Nothing flashes cleanly away.
traits.supernatural_cost: The body becomes slower, less sensate and more environmental. Repairs trap debris, memories and other people's damage until the individual is buried inside the structure.
combination_rules: As primary, Fortified owns load path, repair strata and grounded mass.
As secondary, it appears through interlock, compression cracks or redistribution behavior rather than more bulk.
With Titan, Fortified is structural logic while Titan is scale, accumulation and communal burden.
With Catalyst, one structural material may transform while the overall load path remains legible.

compact_visual_references.form: terraced load paths settling into a broad base
compact_visual_references.surface: masonry bonds and layered field repairs
compact_visual_references.motion: impact traveling downward and dispersing through strata
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: the individual buried beneath accumulated structure

traits.prop_free_definition: A living load-bearing structure survives by redistributing impact until repair layers bury mobility, sensation and selfhood.

traits.mechanics_anchor: A team bonus determined by keeping the largest trait family at a precise small size.
traits.core_fantasy: Coerced concord and forced chorus: strength emerges when unlike beings are made to occupy an exact shared rhythm without becoming one identity.
traits.emotional_tone: Beautiful unease, social control, suppressed dissent and the intimacy of being synchronized against one's will.
traits.silhouette_language: Paired masses and near-symmetry establish rhythm, but one deliberate mismatch keeps the harmony coercive. The form should feel tuned rather than cheerful.
garment_anatomy_families: Paired organs, limbs or bodily rhythms with one controlled disagreement
Two-part garment construction from unrelated cultural families
Resonant membrane, pleat and repeated-edge anatomy
Symbiotic or conjoined nonhuman bodies
Group forms organized by spacing and cadence rather than matching appearance
traits.magic_behavior: Breath, shadow, pulse or movement synchronizes across precise small groupings. Resonance strengthens through controlled repetition and breaks violently when the count becomes too large.
traits.supernatural_cost: Individual timing and emotion erode. Dissonance ruptures tissue, multiplies voices or forces private feeling into public rhythm.
combination_rules: As primary, Harmony owns pairing, rhythm and one controlled mismatch.
As secondary, it synchronizes one motion or surface channel without duplicating the whole design.
With Kaleidoscope, use at most two controlled pattern systems so perception fracture does not erase cadence.
With Liaison, Harmony is shared rhythm while Liaison is directional transfer and boundary loss.

compact_visual_references.form: near-symmetry with one deliberate disagreement
compact_visual_references.surface: paired rhythms producing interference instead of decoration
compact_visual_references.motion: breath and shadow locking to an exact count
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: private emotion forced into public synchronization

traits.prop_free_definition: Exact shared rhythm creates power by suppressing individual timing, making concord beautiful, coercive and physically dangerous.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Team attack, spell and health gains per distinct active trait, with acceleration at very wide diversity.
traits.core_fantasy: Psychedelic perception fracture: diversity bends the way reality is seen, producing power through unstable multiplicity rather than clean elemental color.
traits.emotional_tone: Mesmerized dread, manic curiosity, sensory trespass and the alien confidence of seeing several incompatible truths at once.
traits.silhouette_language: Contours flare or repeat at misregistered angles. Pattern must alter perceived mass and negative space, not sit on a conventional mage body as decoration.
garment_anatomy_families: Optical-pattern textiles with weathered, uneven registration
Chromatophore, compound-eye and segmented sensory anatomy
Flared, folded and mirrored planes integrated into the body
Fungal, carnival-decay, court and monastic sensory-survivor families
Nonhuman bodies whose outline changes with viewing angle
traits.magic_behavior: Edges split into restrained chromatic offsets, silhouettes repeat at false positions and local space breathes or folds. Use three chromatic notes plus neutrals by default, not a full-spectrum explosion.
traits.supernatural_cost: Vision, identity and body registration fragment. The user cannot fully trust location, color, memory or the boundary between multiple selves.
combination_rules: As primary, Kaleidoscope owns contour distortion, optical pattern and perceptual negative space.
As secondary, it owns controlled misregistration or one pattern family while the primary trait restricts color and material.
Default to three chromatic notes plus neutrals; expand only when the individual concept proves necessity.
With Blessed, color is damaged revelation; with Sanguine, color behaves like bruising, blood memory or sensory hunger.

compact_visual_references.form: flared contours occupying several false positions
compact_visual_references.surface: weathered moiré and smoky chromatic misregistration
compact_visual_references.motion: local afterimages breathing out of phase
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: fractured vision and unstable bodily registration

traits.prop_free_definition: Perception fractures into weathered chromatic multiplicity, granting power while location, identity and sensory truth become unreliable.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Formation links between adjacent allies without shared traits, including mutual exchange and higher-tier triangular mana behavior.
traits.core_fantasy: Shared wounds and dangerous connection: power created by crossing boundaries between unlike beings until harm, feeling and intent can no longer stay private.
traits.emotional_tone: Predatory empathy, tense intimacy, manipulative diplomacy and fear of needing someone whose pain can enter your body.
traits.silhouette_language: Directional lines cross the torso or extend toward absent partners. The body should look organized around transfer and interrupted personal boundaries, not romance.
garment_anatomy_families: Joined seams and crossed construction from unlike material families
Connective-tissue, graft and shared-circulation anatomy
Asymmetrical bodies shaped by reaching toward an absent counterpart
Diplomatic, parasitic, ritual and communal-survivor garment families
Networked nonhuman organisms with visibly unequal nodes
traits.magic_behavior: Energy, injury or mana travels along the shortest visible relationship and changes both ends. Higher-tier triangles should feel like tense circulation, not orbiting connection nodes.
traits.supernatural_cost: Wounds, emotion and identity leak across relationships. Movement is constrained by absent partners, and boundaries remain damaged after the link ends.
combination_rules: As primary, Liaison owns directional reach, crossing geometry and boundary loss.
As secondary, it changes what transfers through one existing seam, organ or motion channel.
With Harmony, Liaison carries consequence while Harmony sets the shared cadence.
Connection must alter both participants; a detached floating line is never sufficient trait proof.

compact_visual_references.form: cross-body lines reaching toward an absent counterpart
compact_visual_references.surface: unlike materials joined by unequal living seams
compact_visual_references.motion: consequence traveling the shortest relational path
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: boundaries left porous after connection ends

traits.prop_free_definition: Unlike beings gain power by sharing consequence until wounds, emotion and personal boundaries can no longer remain separate.

traits.mechanics_anchor: The nearest unlike ally becomes a Pupil and inherits part of the Mentor's stats and later mana behavior.
traits.core_fantasy: Cruel instruction and inherited discipline: power transferred through correction, repetition and the reshaping of another being into useful form.
traits.emotional_tone: Authoritarian patience, disappointed contempt, possessive pride and fear disguised as pedagogy.
traits.silhouette_language: An asymmetrical authority posture directs attention toward a lower or adjacent space. Repeated forms appear with one disciplined deviation, suggesting correction rather than companionship.
garment_anatomy_families: Severe academic, military, craft, monastic and brood-trainer construction
Bodies marked by repeated correction and overtrained posture
Authority asymmetry concentrated in gaze, spine or directing limbs
Pupil-like secondary anatomy that is similar but deliberately incomplete
Alien imprint organisms and coercive brood bodies
traits.magic_behavior: Transfer travels through posture, gaze and positional correction. The recipient visibly tightens, repeats or inherits a flaw; the effect is instructional pressure, not a friendly buff glow.
traits.supernatural_cost: The source hollows or ages while the recipient inherits compulsions, injuries and an inability to distinguish learned strength from imposed identity.
combination_rules: As primary, Mentor owns hierarchy, direction and repeated form with correction.
As secondary, it creates one visible inheritance or overcorrection in the primary trait's channel.
The Pupil must not become a smaller copy; shared damage and imposed discipline are more important than matching appearance.
With Scholar, Mentor imposes and transmits while Scholar stores and consumes knowledge.

compact_visual_references.form: one looming posture directing an incomplete echo
compact_visual_references.surface: graded marks and scars of repeated correction
compact_visual_references.motion: strength transferring as posture tightens
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: source hollowing as imposed identity spreads

traits.prop_free_definition: Authority transfers strength by correcting another body until discipline, injury and identity become inherited together.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Post-combat wealth generated by Moguls who survive.
traits.core_fantasy: Predatory wealth and vault aristocracy: survival converts the world into owned value, making accumulated resources feel physically heavy and socially violent.
traits.emotional_tone: Entitled calm, famine-era opulence, contemptuous patience and terror of losing what has replaced human feeling.
traits.silhouette_language: The figure takes more spatial authority than its body requires. Weight gathers centrally and spreads outward through dense, formal or storage-like masses.
garment_anatomy_families: Industrial finery and decayed formal construction
Storage-like or collateralized anatomy
Broad, weighted and compressed body plans
Hoarding beasts and alien resource organs
Famine aristocrats physically invaded by precious materials
traits.magic_behavior: Survival makes nearby surfaces visually heavier, darker or more compressed. Accumulation reads as pressure and occupancy rather than literal currency appearing in the air.
traits.supernatural_cost: The body becomes collateral and storage. Mobility, empathy and empty space disappear as valued matter invades flesh and replaces private identity.
forbidden_cliches: treasure pile as the whole design
combination_rules: As primary, Mogul owns spatial occupancy, central weight and precious-material invasion.
As secondary, it densifies one material or turns one survival mark into collateral.
With Cartel, Mogul is the accumulating center while Cartel is the network distributing status and benefit.
With Titan, avoid simply making a larger rich humanoid; express wealth as landscape, storage or communal burden.

compact_visual_references.form: central weight expanding beyond personal space
compact_visual_references.surface: worn luxury compressed into dense storage strata
compact_visual_references.motion: survival making nearby matter heavier and darker
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: flesh replaced by collateral and owned value

traits.prop_free_definition: Survival accumulates as physical and social weight until wealth occupies the body and displaces empathy, mobility and self.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Reduced ability cost with unstable high-tier full casts.
traits.core_fantasy: A nervous-system storm: power exceeds containment, skipping normal buildup and forcing the body into sudden complete discharge.
traits.emotional_tone: Manic anticipation, sensory terror, compulsive risk and exhausted relief after a catastrophic release.
traits.silhouette_language: Joints and contours fail to agree on one rhythm. Tension gathers along branching paths, then breaks the silhouette at one or two containment failures.
garment_anatomy_families: Exposed conductor, nerve and pressure-channel anatomy
Burst-open seams and interrupted joint construction
Storm debtor, psychic rupture, reactor and spore-burst families
Ceramic insulation and carbonized tissue bodies
Nonhuman organisms built around irregular discharge cycles
traits.magic_behavior: Charge arrives in irregular surges, snaps to a full state and drops suddenly dead. Discharge must reveal a failed containment path rather than wrapping the whole figure in continuous neon.
traits.supernatural_cost: Tremor, sensory loss, burn, memory reset and muscles firing against their own joints accumulate after every forced complete release.
combination_rules: As primary, Overload owns broken cadence, tension paths and containment failure.
As secondary, it changes the timing of one primary-trait behavior and leaves one burn or dead zone.
With Chronomancer, release skips time and arrives out of order rather than merely accelerating.
With Sanguine, discharge is fueled by hunger or circulation but must not become a generic electric vampire.

compact_visual_references.form: branching tension interrupted by failed joints
compact_visual_references.surface: burned insulation and copper-green discharge paths
compact_visual_references.motion: irregular surge, complete snap, sudden dead drop
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: tremor, sensory loss and muscles fighting joints

traits.prop_free_definition: Power skips normal buildup and discharges completely through a body that accumulates burn, tremor and sensory collapse.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Omnivamp, excess healing interactions and high-tier funnel behavior.
traits.core_fantasy: Vampyr hunger and memory through blood: survival stolen from others carries appetite, history and contamination back into the body.
traits.emotional_tone: Starved elegance, predatory exhaustion, intimate revulsion and the shame or pride of needing another being to remain whole.
traits.silhouette_language: Mass pulls inward toward hunger. Whether courtly, medical, feral or nonhuman, the body should imply depletion and predation rather than one caped aristocratic shape.
garment_anatomy_families: Courtly, medical, feral, monastic and laboring vampyr cultures
Starved, overfilled, vascular and leech-like anatomy
Insect, botanical, fungal and alien fluid predators
Predatory elegance built from posture and depletion rather than exposure
Bodies marked by borrowed circulation and remembered wounds
traits.magic_behavior: Blood, heat or vitality pulls inward. Excess restoration packs beneath the surface as tense swelling, darkened veins or hardened clot-like protection; high-tier funneling should feel hungry, not generous.
traits.supernatural_cost: Hunger never resolves. Borrowed memories invade, veins blacken and the body oscillates between dangerous emptiness and painful overfilling.
forbidden_cliches: all Sanguine units as pale humans
combination_rules: As primary, Sanguine owns hunger, inward-pulled mass and borrowed circulation.
As secondary, it alters appetite, healing behavior or one vascular surface without forcing red clothing or pallor.
Another trait determines culture and body plan; Sanguine determines what is consumed and what the body remembers.
With Exile, hunger becomes displaced and culturally rootless; with Titan, consumed lives accumulate as communal mass.

compact_visual_references.form: starved mass pulling inward around a predatory center
compact_visual_references.surface: dried oxblood, clot marbling and borrowed veins
compact_visual_references.motion: vitality drawn inward and packed beneath the skin
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: borrowed memories and cycles of emptiness and overfill

traits.prop_free_definition: Predatory hunger steals vitality and memory, sustaining the body while making emptiness, contamination and borrowed identity permanent.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Mana regeneration for members and allies.
traits.core_fantasy: Knowledge consumed as fuel: learning becomes a metabolic act that stores, burns and releases understanding through a damaged living archive.
traits.emotional_tone: Compulsive curiosity, sleepless resentment and the hollow superiority of someone who remembers facts better than a self.
traits.silhouette_language: The body organizes around storage and retrieval. Weight or attention gathers on one working side, producing asymmetry from use rather than a generic academic outline.
garment_anatomy_families: Field, archive, laboratory, oral-history and scavenger knowledge-worker construction
Storage scars, memory tissue and indexed anatomy
Work-worn posture with one overused side
Alien recorder bodies and collective-memory organisms
Bodies partially overwritten by the material they study
traits.magic_behavior: Information is absorbed, compressed and released as a deliberate pulse. Notation stays concentrated in one bodily or material locus; loose-page storms are prohibited.
traits.supernatural_cost: Memory is overwritten by reference, senses become catalog entries and sleep disappears. The body becomes an archive that can retrieve everything except its original owner.
combination_rules: As primary, Scholar owns storage posture, indexing and bodily accumulation.
As secondary, it records or metabolizes one channel belonging to the primary trait.
With Mentor, Scholar is the learner or archive while Mentor is coercive transfer and correction.
With Overload, stored knowledge releases too early or all at once and leaves erased sections.

compact_visual_references.form: one overworked side shaped around storage and retrieval
compact_visual_references.surface: burned indexing, absorbed ink and memory scars
compact_visual_references.motion: information compressing before one deliberate pulse
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: the archive preserving facts while erasing its owner

traits.prop_free_definition: Knowledge becomes metabolic fuel, increasing capacity while memory, sleep and personal identity are overwritten by the living archive.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Attack damage with kill-based stacking for members and partial allied benefit at low tiers.
traits.core_fantasy: Violence as momentum: every successful impact teaches the body to commit harder, making motion, damage and confidence accumulate together.
traits.emotional_tone: Compulsive forward drive, pain dependence, competitive contempt and fear of what happens if movement stops.
traits.silhouette_language: Mass leans into a clear forward vector. Impact-adapted joints and an asymmetric recovery line show repeated collisions without forcing every member into a fist-fighter body.
garment_anatomy_families: Impact-adapted joints and forward-loaded anatomy
Battered labor, pit, military, hunting and surgical combat construction
Long-limbed, compact, quadruped and many-limbed striking bodies
Scar systems aligned with repeated motion
Bodies whose old injuries have become mechanical advantages
traits.magic_behavior: Each successful strike adds visible stance, cadence or damage memory. Shock travels linearly through the body and target; momentum never becomes a generic flame aura.
traits.supernatural_cost: Joints deform, pain becomes necessary and old impacts replay through the body. Stopping produces collapse, tremor or a sudden return of accumulated injury.
combination_rules: As primary, Striker owns forward vector, recoil and accumulated impact damage.
As secondary, it changes cadence or one joint system while the primary trait keeps mass and culture.
Combat role still determines reach and weight; Striker does not force melee or humanoid anatomy.
With Bulwark, stored compression releases forward; with Sanguine, momentum is fed by stolen vitality.

compact_visual_references.form: forward-loaded mass with an asymmetric recoil line
compact_visual_references.surface: old impacts aligned into functional scar patterns
compact_visual_references.motion: each hit tightening the next committed vector
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: deformed joints and collapse when momentum stops

traits.prop_free_definition: Successful impact compounds into forward power while joints, pain and old injuries make stopping increasingly catastrophic.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Maximum health, cast stacking, allied regeneration and high-tier excess-healing protection.
traits.core_fantasy: Cairn giant and communal endurance: many lives, burdens or environments accumulated into one immense body that survives by carrying more than a self.
traits.emotional_tone: Ancient exhaustion, possessive caretaking, monumental loneliness and the slow terror of becoming a place instead of a person.
traits.silhouette_language: Scale comes from relation, overhang and accumulated strata—not one bodybuilder anatomy. Tall skeletal, broad, quadruped, columnar and landscape-like plans are all valid.
garment_anatomy_families: Tall skeletal, broad maternal, quadruped, columnar and terrain-like giant forms
Cairn, strata, growth-ring and communal-flesh anatomy
Bodies embedded with traces of former lives or environments
Shipwreck, burial, root and compacted-community construction
Human-scale carriers enlarged by accumulated burden rather than muscle
traits.magic_behavior: Casting visibly adds mass, strata or remembered lives. Restoration moves low and outward through the ground or shared body; excess packs into crust rather than shining as clean protection.
traits.supernatural_cost: The individual is buried beneath accumulated lives. Movement cracks body and environment, memory becomes communal and selfhood gradually turns into monument or habitat.
combination_rules: As primary, Titan owns scale, carrying and accumulated-life strata.
As secondary, it enlarges the consequence or communal burden of one primary-trait channel rather than the whole silhouette.
With Fortified, Titan provides magnitude and memory while Fortified provides load-bearing structure.
With Blessed, shame and compulsory penance must remain legible at monumental scale.

compact_visual_references.form: immense overhangs carrying visible accumulated strata
compact_visual_references.surface: clay, burial layers and traces of former lives
compact_visual_references.motion: new mass settling after each exertion
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: selfhood buried until the body becomes a place

traits.prop_free_definition: An immense communal body endures by accumulating lives and burdens until the original self becomes landscape, monument and memory.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Free shop rerolls each round.
traits.core_fantasy: Road-market chance broker: survival through exchange, adaptation and the ability to replace a bad possibility before it hardens into fate.
traits.emotional_tone: Restless charm, opportunistic suspicion, cultural flexibility and private terror that everything—including identity—can be traded away.
traits.silhouette_language: The form looks able to redirect, reveal alternatives or reorganize quickly. Asymmetry suggests many routes and histories without becoming a cheerful overloaded merchant caricature.
garment_anatomy_families: Mobile layered construction assembled from several routes and cultures
Pack-animal, scavenger, caravan and exchange-organism anatomy
Adaptive folds, pockets, skin flaps and replaceable body sections
Hands, eyes or sensory arrays specialized for comparison
Bodies visibly patched with parts or histories acquired through trade
traits.magic_behavior: Possibilities briefly swap, fan or reorder, then one becomes real. Chance reads through repositioning and replacement, never a cloud of currency, dice or tickets.
traits.supernatural_cost: Every exchange removes a piece of origin. The body becomes patched from traded histories, luck scars accumulate and the broker can no longer prove which memories were originally theirs.
combination_rules: As primary, Trader owns adaptability, branching routes and visibly acquired history.
As secondary, it permits one channel to swap, patch or present alternatives.
With Cartel, Trader remains mobile and opportunistic while Cartel imposes closed membership and rank.
With Exile, traded histories should worsen the loss of origin without defaulting to a generic traveler.

compact_visual_references.form: asymmetric layers able to pivot into several routes
compact_visual_references.surface: patched histories from incompatible places
compact_visual_references.motion: possibilities fanning, swapping and hardening into one
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: origin erased by too many successful exchanges

traits.prop_free_definition: Adaptation replaces bad possibilities through exchange, but every favorable bargain trades away another piece of origin and identity.

traits.mechanics_anchor: Attacks progressively strip physical and magical resistance.
traits.core_fantasy: Ruined judgment and obsessive revenge: an accusation made bodily, peeling away every defense until only the condemned target remains.
traits.emotional_tone: Cold grievance, tunnel vision, violated dignity and the terrible relief of reducing a complex world to one guilty thing.
traits.silhouette_language: A narrowed body commits to one diagonal line and one target. The posture should look accusatory and self-eroding, not righteous or heroically avenging.
garment_anatomy_families: Scarred court, military, civic, peasant and execution-survivor construction
Diagonal anatomy and narrowed asymmetry
Bodies etched by confession, testimony or repeated pursuit
Immune-hunter and prey-specialist nonhuman forms
Surfaces progressively stripped of protective layers
traits.magic_behavior: Every hit scrapes, scores or erases a visible layer of resistance. The effect carves and narrows toward the target instead of producing a righteous glow.
traits.supernatural_cost: Obsession removes nuance, twists the body toward one quarry and corrodes the accuser with every judgment. Confession scars remain even when the target is gone.
combination_rules: As primary, Vindicator owns the accusatory diagonal, narrowing and progressive stripping.
As secondary, it erodes one defense or surface channel chosen by the primary trait.
With Executioner, Vindicator exposes and strips while Executioner delivers final procedure.
With Exile, revenge may grow from erased identity, but absence must remain distinct from accusation.

compact_visual_references.form: one narrowed diagonal committing the whole body
compact_visual_references.surface: layers scored, struck through and progressively erased
compact_visual_references.motion: each contact carving closer to an exposed core
compact_visual_references.cost_mark: the accuser corroded into one permanent grievance

traits.prop_free_definition: Obsessive judgment strips away every defense while reducing the accuser's body, nuance and identity to one grievance.

combination_quick_rules: First select an art-primary trait from gameplay identity and the strongest surviving concept idea.
Assign secondary traits to material, pattern, palette, motion or cost channels that do not compete with the primary silhouette.
A third trait receives one subtle corruption or rhythm only; never give all three traits equal visual volume.
Combat role remains independently readable through stance, reach, speed and mass even when trait grammar is removed.
Individual identity must still determine face, age, body type, species, culture and form of villainy.
Test the design with color removed, effects removed and props hidden; at least one trait and the role must survive.
If two traits both claim the same channel, the primary keeps it and the secondary moves to magic behavior or supernatural cost.
No combination may erase the visible price of surviving this world.
